name: CCN-CERT BP/02 — Correo electronico (Spain)
description: Spanish CCN-CERT email best-practice profile. Emphasises SPF/DKIM/DMARC plus secure transport for both inbound (STARTTLS) and client-facing submission/retrieval (587/465/993/995 via RFC 6186 SRV). Much of BP/02 is end-user awareness and end-to-end encryption (PGP/S-MIME) which is not DNS-observable and is attestation-only.
attestation_only: End-to-end message encryption and signing (PGP/GPG, S-MIME)
Client stores IMAP/POP over TLS only; no credentials cached in browser
